course.title: Lesson 3: Please Send Me a Card

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: How many cards did the writer send?

translations.zh-Hans: 作者寄出了多少张明信片？
明信片总是搅得我度假不得安宁。

segments.text: Last summer I went to Italy.

translations.zh-Hans: 去年夏天我去了意大利。

segments.text: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.

translations.zh-Hans: 我参观了博物馆，还常坐在公共花园里。

segments.text: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.

translations.zh-Hans: 一位友好的服务员教了我几句意大利语。

segments.text: Then he lent me a book.
I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word.

translations.zh-Hans: 我读了几行，却一个字也不懂。

segments.text: Every day I thought about postcards.

translations.zh-Hans: 我每天都想着明信片的事。

segments.text: My holidays passed quickly, but I did not send cards to my friends.

translations.zh-Hans: 假期过得很快，可我没有给朋友们寄明信片。

segments.text: On the last day I made a big decision.

translations.zh-Hans: 到了最后一天，我作出了一项重大决定。

segments.text: I got up early and bought 37 cards.

translations.zh-Hans: 我早早起床，买了37张明信片。

segments.text: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card.

translations.zh-Hans: 我在房间里待了一整天，却连一张明信片也没有写。
